task_completion.description: Open EdrawMax and access the Garden Design libraries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax application is open with a blank canvas, and the 'Garden Design' or similar landscape library panel is visible on the side.

task_completion.description: Add a patio area with stone/paver patterns and a walkway leading to it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The canvas contains a distinct patio shape featuring a stone or paver texture/pattern, and a path or walkway shape connecting to the patio.

task_completion.description: Add a dining table with chairs on the patio and a water feature.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The canvas shows dining furniture symbols (table and chairs) placed specifically on the patio area, and a water feature symbol (like a blue pond, pool, or fountain) elsewhere in the design.

task_completion.description: Add at least three trees and perimeter shrubs or hedges.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The canvas contains a minimum of three distinct tree symbols and multiple shrub or hedge symbols arranged around the perimeter or edges of the design.

task_completion.description: Include the required title and text labels for the elements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text boxes are visible on the canvas containing the title 'Johnson Residence - Garden Concept' at the top, and labels reading 'Patio', 'Dining Area', 'Water Feature', and 'Trees' pointing to or placed near their respective elements.

task_completion.description: Save the project as Johnson_Landscape_Plan.eddx in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'Johnson_Landscape_Plan.eddx' in the Documents directory, the EdrawMax window title updated to this filename, or a file explorer showing the saved .eddx file.

task_completion.description: Export the design as a PNG image to the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog showing the PNG format and the filename 'Johnson_Landscape_Plan.png' in the Documents directory, a successful export notification, or a file explorer showing the exported .png file.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the design.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively interacting with the EdrawMax interface, dragging and dropping shapes from the library, and using text tools, rather than just running a script.

integrity.description: The design is composed of genuine EdrawMax shapes and not a pasted image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The canvas should show individual selectable vector shapes with bounding boxes or adjustment handles during the creation process, not a single flat image pasted from the internet.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like 'touch', 'curl', or 'wget' being used to create dummy files named Johnson_Landscape_Plan.eddx or .png.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected EDDX file path is /home/ga/Documents/Johnson_Landscape_Plan.eddx (minimum size 5000 bytes). The expected PNG export path is /home/ga/Documents/Johnson_Landscape_Plan.png (minimum size 20000 bytes). The design must contain the text: 'Johnson Residence', 'Patio', 'Dining', 'Water', and 'Tree'.
